---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused product or workflow improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user or operator problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

What should the repository do differently?

## Scope

Which surface does this primarily affect?

- execution core
- control plane
- transport shell
- public documentation

## Semantics Impact

Would this change anything about:

- execution semantics
- approval semantics
- recovery semantics

If yes, explain the intended change.

## Why This Matters Now

Why should this be prioritized in the current phase?

## Alternatives Considered

What simpler or narrower options did you consider?
